ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season number during which the match occurred */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number during which the match occurred */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_year")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "player_pos" TEXT /* Position the player plays (e.g., RB, WR) */,
  "player_team" TEXT /* Team the player is associated with */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  "player_position_detail" TEXT /* Detailed position (e.g., Left Wing, Right Back) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_player_team FOREIGN KEY ("player_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match during which the performance occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose performance is recorded */,
  "points" REAL /* Points scored by the player in the match */,
  "set_pos" TEXT /* Set position of the player during the match (e.g., BN, D/ST, K) */,
  "points_by_position" REAL /* Points scored by the player in the set position */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Fantasy points scored by the player */,
  "real_time" INTEGER /* Real time in minutes the player was on the field */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player during the match */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Trading status of the player during the match */,
  "performance_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the player's performance (e.g., standout plays, mistakes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "team_founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Current coach of the team */,
  "team_owner" TEXT /* Current owner of the team */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team colors (e.g., red, white) */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season (e.g., 2014) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the season took place */,
  "ruleset" TEXT /* Ruleset used for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user on the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "user_first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "user_last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "user_registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
